privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). The target case name is 'USB_Investigation_2024' with case number 'CASE-2024-001'. The required disk image path is '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd', which will resolve to an expected case directory at '/home/ga/Cases/USB_Investigation_2024' based on the Autopsy configuration established in setup_autopsy.sh.
